project.name: SAP CRM - DAM Integration
project.description: Integration of a SAP CRM sytem and OT MediaManager

target.name: compile
target.description: Integration of a SAP CRM system and OT MediaManager

echo.message: compile.16.classpath = ${toString:compile.16.classpath}
ant.classpath = ${toString:ant.classpath}

else.echo: No version found. Replacing in damlink-smartedit-ui.html: @DAMLINK_VERSION_PARAMETER@ --> ''
No version found. Replacing in damlink-backoffice-ui.html: @DAMLINK_VERSION_PARAMETER@ --> ''
No version found. Replacing in damlink-ui-dev.html: @DAMLINK_VERSION_PARAMETER@ --> ''
No version found. Replacing in damlink-xecm-ui.html: @DAMLINK_VERSION_PARAMETER@ --> ''
No version found. Replacing in damlink-sap-ui.html: @DAMLINK_VERSION_PARAMETER@ --> ''
No version found. Replacing in mds-config.html: @DAMLINK_VERSION_PARAMETER@ --> ''

target.name: ixmk.setup
target.description: Creates the setup stuff for ixmk.

echo.message: Downloading jersey libs from OT repo.
Downloaded jersey libs from OT repo.
Downloading httpclient libs from OT repo.
Downloaded httpclient libs from OT repo.
Downloading commons-configuration\lib libs from OT repo.
Downloaded commons-configuration\lib libs from OT repo.
Downloading jackson libs from OT repo.
Downloaded jackson libs from OT repo.
Downloading resteasy libs from OT repo.
Downloaded resteasy libs from OT repo.
Downloading SAP_UME/lib libs from OT repo.
Downloaded resteasy libs from OT repo.
Downloading apache\lib libs from OT repo.
Downloaded apache\lib libs from OT repo.

Downloading swagger libs from OT repo.
Downloaded swagger libs from OT repo.

Downloaded jakarta-xml-ws libs from OT repo.

release.number= ${release.number}
